latin: Aliquis olim mihi dixit mundum me volvere iturum esse. non sum instrumentum acutissimum in tugurio. stultus videbar, digito et pollice in fronte mea.

questions.prompt: What did someone once tell the speaker?
questions.target: That the world was going to roll him
choices: That the world was going to roll him

questions.prompt: How does the speaker describe himself?
questions.target: Not the sharpest tool in the shed
choices: Not the sharpest tool in the shed

translation: Somebody once told me the world was going to roll me. I'm not the sharpest tool in the shed. I looked foolish, with my finger and thumb in the shape of an L on my forehead.
